npc_bartender: Town talks louder after sundown. Buy a drink if you want names.
npc_server: Rooms in back are rented by the hour. Some folks use them to hide.
npc_shopkeeper: People buy water before they disappear. That is all I know.
npc_mechanic: The road east eats engines. Not from sand. From patrol interference.
npc_doctor: I treat miners who claim they were never at a mine.
npc_sheriff: My jail is public. Whatever is out past the ridge is not mine to name.
npc_dock_worker: Freight logs show roads that do not exist on town maps.
npc_secret_contact: The camp is real. Dex is alive if you move before the storm clears.
npc_inmate: I saw black-red vehicles past the dry wash. Sheriff says I saw dust.
